indicator.title: U-2 unemployment rate, job losers
indicator.notes: Alternative labor underutilization measure U-2; job losers and people who completed temporary jobs as a percent of the civilian labor force. BLS series `LNS14023621` is the verified seasonally adjusted rate; `LNS13025671` is not a valid BLS series.

observations.footnotes: Data unavailable due to the 2025 lapse in appropriations.
January 2026 estimates were revised to incorporate updated population controls. For more information, see www.bls.gov/cps/documentation.htm#pop.
